tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Tabbed by Kwint and Troy

Artist : Taylor Swift
Song   : Shake It Off
Album  : 1989


Just an alternate version with capo on 5!


[Verse]

[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]
I stay out too late[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Got nothing in my brain[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]
That's what people say, mmhmm[/tab]
                   
That's what people say, mmhmm

[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
I go on too many dates[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]
But I can't make them stay[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]D[/ch]
At least that's what people say, mmhmm[/tab]
                   
That's what people say, mmhmm


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch] 
But I keep cruising[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Can't stop, won't stop moving[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
It's like I got this music[/tab]
                   
In my mind, saying it's gonna be alright


[Chorus]

[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Cause the players gonna play, play, play, play, play[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
And the haters gonna hate, hate, hate, hate, hate[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
Baby I'm just gonna shake, shake, shake, shake, shake[/tab]

Shake it off, shake it off
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Heart breakers gonna break, break, break, break, break[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
And the fakers gonna fake, fake, fake, fake, fake[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
Baby I'm just gonna shake, shake, shake, shake, shake[/tab]

Shake it off, Shake it off


[Verse]

[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]
I never miss a beat[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]
I'm lightning on my feet[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]D[/ch]
And that's what they don't see, mmhmm[/tab]
                       
That's what they don't see, mmhmm

[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm dancing on my own[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]G[/ch]
I make the moves up as I go[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]D[/ch]
And that's what they don't know, mmhmm[/tab]
                       
That's what they don't know, mmhmm


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]
But I keep cruising[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Can't stop, won't stop moving[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
It's like I got this music[/tab]
                   
In my mind, saying it's gonna be alright


[Chorus]

[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Cause the players gonna play, play, play, play, play[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
And the haters gonna hate, hate, hate, hate, hate[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
Baby I'm just gonna shake, shake, shake, shake, shake[/tab]

Shake it off, shake it off
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Heart breakers gonna break, break, break, break, break[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
And the fakers gonna fake, fake, fake, fake, fake[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
Baby I'm just gonna shake, shake, shake, shake, shake[/tab]

Shake it off, Shake it off

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Shake it off, I shake it off,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I shake it off, I shake it off,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I shake it off, I shake it off,[/tab]

I Shake it off, I shake it off


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] -
Hey, hey, hey[/tab]
Just think while you been getting down and out about the liars
And the dirty dirty cheats of the world
You could have been getting down to this sick beat

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
My ex man brought his new girl friend she's like[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Oh my God but I'm just shake[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
until the fella over there with the hella good hair [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
won't you come on over baby we can [/tab]
shake, shake, shake, yeaaaahh ohhh


[Chorus]

[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]
Cause the players gonna play, play, play, play, play[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
And the haters gonna hate, hate, hate, hate, hate[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
Baby I'm just gonna shake, shake, shake, shake, shake[/tab]

Shake it off, shake it off
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Heart breakers gonna break, break, break, break, break[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
And the fakers gonna fake, fake, fake, fake, fake[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Shake it off, I shake it off,[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I shake it off, I shake it off,[/tab]

I shake it off, I shake it off,[/tab]
